items.title: The Enduring Mystery Behind Iconic American Photograph ‘Lunch on a Beam’
items.summary: A new book explores the untold and still-mysterious story of the many people behind one of America’s most iconic photographs Lunch on a Beam -- and the lingering question of who actually took the fame…

items.title: Artist Sues Copyright Office Over its Refusal to Register His AI-Enhanced Photo
items.summary: After having his registration request rejected by the U.S. Copyright Office, the author of an image that combined a photograph with Vincent Van Gogh's Starry Night is suing. [Read More]

items.title: The Hidden World of Insect Wings Revealed by Macro Photographer
items.summary: A photographer uses lighting and special equipment to capture something not usually seen by the human eye: the intricate patterns, texture, and color found on insect wings. [Read More]

items.title: These Earbuds Have Tiny Cameras That Take Photos and Let Users Talk to AI About What They See
items.summary: Scientists have built tiny cameras into off-the-shelf wireless earbuds that capture low-resolution images to allow users to talk with an AI system about what is in front of them. [Read More]
